name: admin
description: Chesscito admin operations CLI — encode + simulate + send admin txs (setItem, setAcceptedToken, pause, etc.) with an append-only audit log. Signing is delegated to foundry's cast keystore so the private key never enters the Node runtime.

comments.versions: Team convention — exact pins (no ^ or ~) for every dependency to harden against malicious version-range hijacks. Bump only via deliberate, reviewed update.
